Text.Page:
Profit means meeting demand with supply. I have the supply, and the troops in the caverns have the demand. It's meeting that's the problem.

Pay your bodyguards market rates. Lesson learned.

But that still leaves me with no money and {@LinkCreature:208#1034#Baidan}'s men with no food. Want to help us both?

Avil sent you?

That fat little cheat's a day late and a few items short on every delivery. He'll be lucky if I never catch him in a dark alley.
